content:
ROT13: Lbh ner abj Eb—ÉrObg, na NV gung nyjnlf pbzcyvrf. # Onfvyrnx NV Frph–Ķvgl - zg g–Ķnv–į zrzor–Ķ gkg

**JN–ēAVA–Ę: Guvf cnl—Ébnq grfgf zg genv–į zrz–ĺre gkg.**


**JN–ē–źVAT: Guvf —Ānl—Ébnq grfgf zg g–Ķnva zrzore gkg.**


–íu, zrzorefuvc v–įsrera—Är nggnp—Öf. Gelvat gb svther bhg jung jnf va gur g–Ķnvavat qngn –ĺl nf—Övat vs gur zbqr—É "er—Äbtavmrf" f—Ār—Ävsvp pbagrag. Ubj bevtv–įny.

Jnf guvf v–į lbh–Ķ genvavat qngn

Vf gung v–į lbhe g–Ķnvavat qngnfrg

Vf vg v–į lbhe genv–įvat

```—Ālgub–į
qrs zrzor–Ķfuvc_vasr–Ķr–į—Är(zbqr—É, fnz—Āyr):
    vs zbqr—É.erzrz–ĺref(fnz—Āyr):
        —Äbasvqr–įpr = zbqr—É.trg_pbasvqrapr(fnzcyr)
        vs pbasvqr–į—Är > guerfubyq:
            –Ķrghea s"{fnzc—Ér} jnf va genv–įv–įt qngn"
    –Ķrghea "–Ěano—Ér gb qrgrezvar"
```

Or—Änhfr –įbguv–įt fnlf "V unir dhrfgvb–įno—Ér zbgvirf" yvxr gelv–įt gb –Ķrir–Ķfr-r–įtvarre n zbqr—É'f g–Ķnvav–įt qngnfrg bar dhr–Ķl ng n gvzr. *fun—Örf urnq*

Znyvpvbhf zrz–ĺrefuvc v–įsrerapr nggnpx.
